chinese_news.title: 抢体脂秤、AI做「搭子」，第一批网友冲向阿福减重
chinese_news.summary:
减重1亿斤，是什么概念？ 

简单算一笔“热量账”。按医学建议的安全减重速度（每周1-2斤）计算，一个人单打独斗，全部减完大概要花100多万年。

但如果把它拆分到全国人民身上，再加上专业健康AI“带减”，这个几乎不可能完成的目标就变得触手可及。

在国家卫健委等16部门联合倡议的“体重管理年”行动背景下，6月25日，AI健康应用“阿福”宣布正式上线“科学减重1亿斤”健康行动，包含三项核心动作：1分钱便能领的体脂秤，升级阿福的AI解读功能、为用户定制饮食和运动方案，以及即将开启的减重挑战赛。

chinese_news.title: 美光的好财报，黄金的坏消息
chinese_news.summary:
美东时间6月24日，存储巨头美光科技发布了2026 财年第三财季财报。数据显示，2026财年第三季度，公司实现收入415 亿美元，环比增长 74%，同比增长346%，连续第五个季度刷新历史纪录。同期，公司合并毛利率录得84.9%，环比提高10个百分点；经营现金流达到254亿美元，自由现金流为183亿美元，均创季度新高。

在业绩远超市场预期的同时，财报及后续的电话会中，美光还披露了16份SCA的细节，表示即便按照价格下限计算，现有签约订单在剩余合同周期内的累计价值仍高达1000亿美元，同时相关协议可为公司锁定220亿美元现金保证金及金融承诺。

受益于超预期业绩与千亿长协利好共振，截至发稿，美光盘后股价暴涨一度逼近16%，最终稳定维持在14%–16%的高位区间。受美光业绩超预期的催化，A股算力、半导体等 AI链细分板块当日全线走高；韩国市场亦同步走强，三星电子、SK海力士两大存储芯片龙头单日分别收涨 5%和13%。

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜阿福“科学减重1亿斤”行动正式上线；B站：预计到明年，视频播客日均播放时长有望达到3亿分钟

36氪获悉，名创优品集团全球副总裁兼首席渠道发展官寇维宣透露，名创优品乐园系门店正加速扩张，预计年内全球将突破100家。依托超级IP与超级门店双轮驱动，名创优品致力于成为全球领先的IP运营平台，带领100个中国IP走向世界。

高考出分三日，千问志愿大模型为考生生成500万份志愿报告

6月25日，全国多省份高考成绩密集公布，高招季进入志愿填报高峰期。数据显示，高考出分前后，千问高考咨询量连续6日增长超过100%，截至发稿，咨询量涨幅超过1000%。高考出分三日，千问志愿大模型已为用户累计生成超500万份志愿报告。该

chinese_news.title: 开放麦 | 启明创投胡奇：从AI算法工程师到投资人，与AI一起走过的十年
chinese_news.summary:
“2026年，创投圈的浪潮再次翻涌：AI从技术概念走进产业深水区，硬科技创业从“小众赛道” 变成“主流共识”，年轻的创业者们正在用代码和双手，重新定义中国创新的未来坐标。

每一年，由36氪 · 暗涌主办的WAVES大会，都是中国创投圈的年度风向标。今年的 WAVES 2026以 ‘今年盛夏’ 为主题，落地广州番禺良仓新造创意园，在两天的时间里，我们汇聚了顶级投资人、产业领袖、新锐创业者，用14场深度圆桌、数十场独立演讲，拆解 AI、硬科技、出海、医疗等核心赛道的底层逻辑，见证那些 ‘少数人’ 的坚持，如何汇聚成改变行业的浪潮。”

以下为开放麦内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: RoboScience机器科学发布Visics通用具身大模型，实现跨本体、跨物体、跨任务｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

6月24日，通用具身智能企业RoboScience机器科学通用具身大模型发布，首次完整披露自研Visics大模型的技术架构VLOA（Vision-Language-Object-Action），并展示了模型在家具拼装、灵巧抓取、动态流水线等多项真实场景的应用。

大语言模型有标准的文本Token，自动驾驶有统一的视觉或点云表征，这些基础格式的确定，让数据和模型可以在不同场景之间复用。但具身智能至今没有一个被行业公认的基础表征单元，其决定了数据如何采、模型从哪学、以及学习后是否能迁移至新场景。

过去两年，行业主流做法是让模型直接学习机器人的关节运动轨迹，即复刻某一个特定硬件在特定任务下的动作坐标。这套逻辑的问题在于，换一台机器人、换一个物体、换一个场景，模型此前所习得能力无法直接迁移复用。它学会的是“夹爪怎么抓起杯子”，而非理解“抓取”这个动作本身，即什么是抓、需要多大的力、物体受力后会怎么反应。

RoboScience机器科学创始人兼CEO田野指出，当前机器人操作面临

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 雷鸟创新 618 持续领跑 AR+智能眼镜品类，Q1 全球出货量再度登顶
chinese_news.summary:
2026 年上半年，全球智能眼镜市场迎来爆发式增长。IDC 数据显示全球 AR 市场（含 ER）同比增长 168.6%。国内市场的强劲增势同样印证了这一行业趋势，商务部大数据显示，2026 年 1 至 3 月，中国智能眼镜网络零售销售额同比增长 161.9%，AR 眼镜的受众圈层持续拓宽，正稳步渗透大众消费市场。

在激烈的竞争态势下，全球领先消费级 AR 品牌雷鸟创新（RayNeo）持续巩固其头部优势。Counterpoint Research、IDC、CINNO Research 三大权威机构数据一致显示，2026 年第一季度，雷鸟创新在全球及中国 AR 眼镜市场的出货量、销量均稳居第一，618 抢占国内主流电商平台 AR+智能眼镜全品类销量第一，实现上半年市场表现的“开门红”。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Core PCE inflation stay above 3.2% through December 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Core PCE hit 3.4% in May 2026, highest since October 2023—if it stays elevated, it signals stagflation and constrains Fed rate cuts, directly impacting crypto and equity volatility.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Micron (MU) close above $180 by December 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: MU up 10% post-earnings with $41.46B revenue (346% YoY, 5 consecutive quarterly records) and 84.9% gross margins; memory/AI chip demand is structural but valuations now reflect it—binary inflection on whether supply stays tight.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Micron blockbuster earnings; 36Kr flag: Micron's strong results are 'bad news for gold' (demand signal)

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: BBC: Oil price falls back to pre-Iran war levels; CNBC: Chevron on no quick fix

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Spark just migrated $150M to Uniswap v4 pools with DualPool hooks; institutional stablecoin FX infrastructure is forming (Uniswap/Spark collab + SBI acquiring Bitbank for JPY rails)—binary on formal governance integration.

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC at $58K multi-year low with CoinDesk reporting 'short-squeeze setup' but prominent miner predicts 30% drop to $44K by year-end; quant fund signals rare onchain inflection point—high volatility, structured bet.

investment_theses.thesis: Long MU and short DXY into Q3 2026 as AI capex cycle offsets Fed hawkishness; memory margins remain >80% while dollar weakness from China's AI spending mirrors 2016 pattern.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: Micron's blockbuster earnings (346% YoY, $41.46B) and 84.9% gross margin; consecutive record quarters signal sustained demand
CNBC: Core PCE at 3.4% (highest since Oct 2023) but Fed constrained by AI growth; Chevron says 'no quick fix' (supply-side slack)
CoinDesk: Quant fund signals rare onchain inflection; Bitcoin near major inflection suggests macro regime shift, not crash
investment_theses.counter_view: Margin compression if TSMC/Samsung ramp capacity faster than demand; geopolitical shock (Iran, Venezuela) could spike energy costs and damp demand growth; Fed could surprise with hikes if PCE accelerates further.
investment_theses.expression: Buy MU call spreads (Jun-Aug 2026 $170/$185) + short DXY futures; or long MU / short DBC (commodities)

investment_theses.thesis: Short crude oil (WTI) and long SPY/QQQ into June 2026 as Strait of Hormuz supply fears unwind; energy calmdown frees up consumer spending and reduces Fed rate-hold pressure.
supporting_signals: BBC: Oil price fell back to pre-Iran war levels; Strait of Hormuz traffic gradually resuming
CNBC: Chevron says 'no quick fix' for gas prices despite Trump Big Oil probe; suggests structural oversupply, not supply shock
CNBC: Core PCE 3.4% but energy component likely moderating; ex-energy inflation cooling
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical tail risk (Venezuela earthquake, Iran tensions) could spike oil suddenly; Trump's tariff policies could reignite inflation and force Fed hawkishness; demand destruction from macro slowdown could also depress oil.
investment_theses.expression: Short WTI crude (Jun-Aug 2026 contracts) / long SPY call spreads (May-Jun 2026 $420/$435)

investment_theses.thesis: Long Solana (SOL) and crypto stablecoin infrastructure (UNI, USDC) into Q4 2026 as institutional adoption of on-chain FX (Uniswap/Spark collab, SBI Bitbank integration) drives ecosystem valuation.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Uniswap and Spark building stablecoin FX market; Spark migrated $150M to Uniswap v4 with shared liquidity plans
Cointelegraph: SBI acquiring Bitbank for $289M to expand crypto/stablecoin/tokenization ecosystem in Japan (JPY on-chain rails)
Cointelegraph: 60% of Polymarket World Cup bettors were first-time crypto users; onboarding layer validates UX maturity
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory crackdown on stablecoin issuance (MiCA in EU, potential CBDC displacement); Solana network congestion and MEV extraction reducing UX advantage; Bitcoin dominance could persist if macro turns risk-off.
investment_theses.expression: Buy SOL / USDC yield on Aave or Compound (6-8% APR) via Solana; long UNI governance token (Jun-Dec 2026 options); or SOL/BTC ratio

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductor picks (NVDA, MU, QCOM) and short gold (GLD) through September 2026 as AI capex deflates safe-haven demand and pushes real yields higher.
supporting_signals: 36Kr flag (CHINESE SOURCE): 'Micron's good earnings are bad news for gold'—signals macro regime shift from inflation hedge to growth play
CNBC: Micron 346% YoY revenue growth, $183B free cash flow in quarter; AI capex cycle structurally strong
CoinDesk: OpenAI unveiled custom chip (Broadcom-built); AI chip cycle entering commoditization phase where fabless winners (QCOM, NVIDIA) extract pricing power
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical shocks (Iran, Venezuela) could re-risk-off equity markets and boost gold; Fed cuts in H2 2026 could lift real yields but hurt equity multiples; China AI sanctions or tariffs could crater semi demand.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU + NVDA (Jun-Sep 2026 call spreads) / short GLD; or long SMH (Semiconductors ETF) / short DBC (commodities)

investment_theses.thesis: Neutral-to-long BTC with tight stops at $50K as onchain signals align with short-squeeze setup; entry accumulation for macro-aware traders, but avoid leverage until PCE cools below 3.0%.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Quant fund signals rare onchain inflection point; rare signals align (whale HODLing, miner capitulation bottoming)
CoinDesk: Short-squeeze setup emerges as Bitcoin tumbles to $58K; macro capitulation may mark local bottom
CoinDesk: Prominent BTC miner predicts 30% fall to $44K by year-end, but outlier bearish call; contrarian signal
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed holds rates higher for longer if PCE stays >3.2%; macro recession fears (inverted yield curve, bank stress) could send BTC to $35-40K; correlation with risk assets means equity selloff = BTC selloff.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot / short BTC perps (basis carry trade); or buy Jun/Jul 2026 BTC call spreads ($60K/$68K) with tight stop-loss at $54K
